commit.message:
fix: complete 4-round bug fix from external audit (44 bugs)

Round 1 (P0 Money Safety):
- Reorder order creation: create → lock_cards → use_coupon → create_payment
- Add rollback on each failure stage (release cards + unuse coupon)
- Wrap reject_withdrawal in database transaction
- Dashboard revenue includes both paid and delivered orders

Round 2 (P1 Security):
- AFF code regex validation + SameSite=Lax cookie
- mask_sensitive_value uses chars() not byte slicing (UTF-8 safe)
- Admin role whitelist validation (admin/super_admin only)
- Constant-time signature comparison in tokenpay_verify
- Strip sensitive fields from public product API (PublicProductResponse)
- Remove allow_command_action from public config endpoint

Round 3 (P2 Functional):
- Fix Telegram notification: pass user email not wallet_address
- Update variant sales_count on delivery
- Expired orders use 'expired' status instead of 'failed'
- Product IDs deduped with HashSet in timeout task
- Variant stock sync on order timeout
- deliver_cards filters by status='locked' + logs mismatch
- Validate currency/chain enum in withdrawal
- Email format validation in order creation and AFF registration
- Return URL uses generic /order?no=&token= instead of epay path
- Fix coupon revalidation on quantity/variant change
- Fix timer cleanup on unmount (Home.vue)
- Fix Coupons.vue i18n param page→current
- Remove readonly from Aff.vue regEmail
- Remove 'pending' from claim_order_for_processing filter

Round 4 (P3 UX/Quality):
- Theme matchMedia listener cleanup on unmount
- 401/403 use router.push instead of window.location.href
- App.vue announcement uses publicApi instead of fetch
- Settings.vue test functions use adminApi instead of fetch
- Products.vue upload uses adminApi instead of fetch
- Settings saveSection only sends section-relevant keys
- Multi-tab auth sync via storage event listener
- Product update: empty string clears optional fields
- Categories toggleStatus sends minimal payload
- Aff.vue: await loadLogs
- Home.vue: reset selectedVariantId in openBuyModal
- useSiteInfo: Promise dedup for concurrent calls

* feat: §29.8.5 cache keying by project (#265)

Add project-scoped state caching for modules to prevent cross-project
data leakage. Module state (list data, filters, scroll positions, etc.)
is keyed by moduleId+projectId and automatically switches when the
active project changes.

New SDK hook: useProjectScopedState(key, initialValue) — works like
useState but the value is keyed by moduleId+projectId+key. Previous
project's cached values are preserved for instant restore on switch-back.

Implementation uses nested Map<moduleId, Map<projectId, Map<key, value>>>
to avoid composite-string key pitfalls. Cache entries are cleaned up on
module dispose (both inline and via registry._disposeSuspended()).

Files:
- src/frontend/src/modules/projectCache.ts (new) — cache singleton
- src/frontend/src/modules/hooks.ts — useProjectScopedState hook
- src/frontend/src/modules/index.ts — barrel export for hook
- src/frontend/src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts — clearModule on dispose

- src/frontend/src/test/projectCache.test.ts (new) — 12 tests

- Implement in SQLite stores with LIKE-escaped project ID matching
- New IProjectCleanupService orchestrator calls all three stores

* fix: persist DataProtection key ring across Docker rebuilds (#269)

AddDataProtection() was called without PersistKeysToFileSystem(),
so the key ring regenerated on every container rebuild. This caused:
- Session cookies to become undecryptable (logout)
- Encrypted OAuth secrets in system_config to fail Unprotect()
- Users prompted to re-run the GitHub OAuth setup wizard

Now explicitly persists keys to ~/.aspnet/DataProtection-Keys,
which is volume-mounted as matrix-keys in docker-compose.yml.
Includes a fallback guard for edge cases where UserProfile is empty.

Also recovered the old key (99f8aade) from the stale
the-matrix_matrix-keys volume into the active docker_matrix-keys
volume, so existing encrypted secrets will decrypt again after
container restart.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: implement §29.7.5 timer & subscription cleanup (#270)

* feat: implement §29.5.8 settings migration on version change

When a module's settingsSchema changes between versions, the host now
detects the version change and migrates settings:

- Track module versions in module_state.version (migration 015)
- On startup, compare manifest version to stored version
- Remove stored values incompatible with new schema constraints
  (type changes, out-of-range numbers, removed select options)
- Handle both global and project-scoped settings (project:{id}:{key})
- Preserve unmapped fields as-is (keys not in new schema)
- Do NOT eagerly persist defaults — preserves §29.5.9 provenance
- On failure: log warning, skip version update, retry next startup
- Secret values skipped (masked, can't validate)

Domain: IModuleSettingsStore gains GetVersionAsync, SetVersionAsync,
DeleteKeyAsync. Infrastructure: SqliteModuleSettingsStore implements them.
ModuleDiscoveryService runs migration after scan.

22 new tests (16 migration behavior + 6 store-level).

commit.message:
feat(benchmarks): add conv_cifar_v6 suite with k-means filters and 30k scaling

Build conv_cifar_v6 suite (11 configs) exploring three new directions:

1. K-means filters as alternative to PCA — k-means centroids with
   triangle activation (Coates & Ng 2012) capture diverse patch
   prototypes rather than top-variance directions.  Test plain k-means
   and ZCA-whitened k-means at 10k/20k with ensembles.

2. PCA + per-patch contrast normalization — normalize_patches removes
   brightness variation at each spatial position, focusing PCA on
   texture/edge patterns.  Previously only tested with GCN (which hurt).

3. 30k ×10 scaling — v5 showed 30k ×5 hits 77.88% (new record).
   Test whether ×10 continues improving at 30k with α=2e-2.
   Also try α=1.5e-2 at ×5 (between 1e-2 and 2e-2 sweet spot).

v5 findings driving these choices:
- ×20 saturated at 20k (77.71% ≈ 77.68% at ×10)
- More filters per branch (48×3, 64×3) didn't help
- Cutout hurt -1.2% (corrupts PCA features)
- Hierarchical 2-stage disappointed (74.62% best)
- 30k + α=2e-2 is the one lever still improving

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
